jobs.name: Torres, Cesar
jobs.issue: washer is giving error codes ER and NF also has water between the tubs

activityLog.text:
We get the ER and NF error code constantly.  We make sure filters are clean and still does it.
It also holds water at the very bottom of the washer under the drum. 3-13-26

jobs.name: Dow, Steve
jobs.issue: dryer wont start when you push the start button

activityLog.text:
The dryer start button ( contacts) don't seem to be working. Had to push on one side of button, then the top of button. Now it won't start wherever you push button.
Very noticeable in last 2 weeks.
Unplugged for the afternoon. No difference. 
I don't think we have a computer board. 3-22-26
I pushed the start button and it won't start at all 3-30-26

jobs.name: Juan Alvarado-Valle
jobs.issue: Dryer knob not turning and has no power

activityLog.text: was giving a new knob first because his original one broke and then he came back saying it still wasn't working and wont turn on
